overview.description: The GraniteShares 2x Long GOOGL Daily ETF (GOU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) stock GOU was launched on Dec 2, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
